name: Salt-And-Pepper Spicy Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Large shrimp, unpeeled and deveined
2 Fresh red chile peppers, coarsely chopped
2 cups Peanut oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. To clean the shrimp, remove the feathery legs and blot the shrimp dry with paper towels.
2. In a small bowl, combine coarse salt, peppercorns, and sugar; set aside.
3. In another small bowl, combine garlic, ginger, scallions, and chopped chilies.
4. Heat a wok or deep skillet until hot and add oil.
5. When the oil is very hot and smoking, add shrimp and fry for about 1 minute or until they are pink.
6. Remove shrimp immediately with a slotted spoon and drain well.
7. Pour off all but 1½ tablespoons of the oil and reheat the wok.
8. Add salt-peppercorns-sugar mixture and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
9. Add garlic-ginger-scallion-chiles mixture and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
10. Return shrimp to the wok and stir-fry over high heat for about 2 minutes until spices have thoroughly coated the outer shell of the shrimp.
11. Transfer shrimp to a serving platter and serve at once.
